title: CC: Link
description: a interesting take and a reimagining of Plethora, for forge
body:
# CC: Link
CC: Link adds a new item and helmet (works with Curios) that, when paired, give you access to almost normal computer but: its wearable. These two, known as "Link Core" and "Link Interface" are the two main components of this mod. The "Link" introduces the Link API, a powerful new interface designed for advanced interaction.

There is also a upgraded version, (3.0.0+ only) known as Integrated Link Core, it is the same as the Link Core but with a Modem and a Speaker, you can also get your position with it.

With the Link, you can:

    Raycast to find blocks, and entities. and get data about those.

    Read player inventory and info

    Display custom HUD elements right on the screen

The link also has a built in peripheral system similar to the pocket computer (literally has pocket api) but can only equip one peripheral.

if you want more than one peripheral i recommend checking out [Unlimited Peripheral Works](https://modrinth.com/mod/unlimitedperipheralworks).

Inspired by [Plethora](https://modrinth.com/mod/plethora-peripherals), and running on forge. 

I do have more ideas for this mod, but for now its only these two items, have fun!

# **WARNING: THIS WAS MADE FOR 1.115.X, DO NOT USE ANY LOWER VERSION.**
